commands.review_summary:
The PR imports shared regex escaping, applies it to oversized-transcript JSON field regex construction, and adds an oversized metadata extraction regression test.

Reproducibility: no. high-confidence user-flow reproduction is established. Source inspection shows the private helper interpolates `field` into `new RegExp(...)`, but current callers pass only hardcoded `id`, `parentId`, `type`, and `role`.
commands.review_followup: Human review should decide whether to land this preventive hardening after contributor real behavior proof; there is no concrete ClawSweeper code repair to apply.

target.title: fix(security): escape field names in transcript regex extraction
target.body:
## Summary

`extractJsonStringFieldPrefix` and `extractJsonNullableStringFieldPrefix` in `session-utils.fs.ts` interpolate the `field` parameter directly into `new RegExp(...)` without escaping. All current callers pass hardcoded field names (`"id"`, `"parentId"`, `"type"`, `"role"`), but the function signature accepts any `string`. A future caller passing a field containing regex metacharacters (e.g. `"foo.bar"`) would match unintended patterns (`.` matches any character instead of a literal dot).

This wraps the interpolation with `escapeRegExp()` from `src/shared/regexp.ts` so metacharacters are treated literally.

## Verification

**Behavior addressed:** Regex injection via unescaped field name interpolation in transcript metadata extraction.

**Real environment tested:** macOS, Node 22, `pnpm check:changed` (full changed-file gate).

**Exact steps or command run after this patch:**

```
# Focused test
node scripts/run-vitest.mjs src/gateway/session-utils.fs.test.ts
# 219 tests passed (73 per workspace x 3)

# Full changed-file gate
pnpm check:changed
# All lanes green: tests, format, lint, typecheck, import cycles, shrinkwrap, patches
```

**Evidence after fix:**

- New test `oversized line metadata extraction preserves id and parentId` verifies that the regex-based field extraction correctly recovers `id` and `parentId` from oversized JSONL lines after the escaping change.
- All 72 existing session-utils tests pass unchanged.
- `pnpm check:changed` exit 0: typecheck, lint (oxlint 218 rules), format (oxfmt), import cycles, shrinkwrap guards, patch guards all green.

**Observed result after fix:** All tests green, no regressions.

**What was not tested:** Crabbox/Testbox remote proof (CLI not available on this machine). Covered by local `pnpm check:changed` which runs the same lanes as CI.
